title: L1 Application Support Specialist (ERP & CRM Systems)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Act as the first point of contact for end users on ERP and CRM systems, providing Level 1 application support and user assistance.
  • Receive, analyse, and log system issues or user requests, performing initial troubleshooting and resolving straightforward cases.
  • Coordinate with external vendors and outsourced consultants by clearly communicating business requirements, issues, and expected outcomes.
  • Gather enhancement requests from business users and work with internal stakeholders to document functional needs.
  • Support user acceptance testing (UAT) by preparing test cases, assisting users during testing, and validating system changes before go-live.
  • Monitor recurring issues and recommend improvements to system usage, processes, or workflows to enhance user experience.
  • Maintain support documentation, including user guides, FAQs, and knowledge base articles for common issues.
  • Ensure proper communication and alignment between business teams, IT, and vendors, while complying with internal IT policies, security standards, and change procedures.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related discipline, with 1–3 years of experience in application or system support.
  • Basic working knowledge of ERP systems and exposure to CRM platforms is advantageous.
  • Familiarity with incident handling, user support processes, and simple business process documentation.
  • Strong communication skills with the ability to translate user needs into clear requirements for vendors, coupled with a customer-oriented and proactive mindset.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Email resume to ken.ng@peopleprofilers.com

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
